title: This or That?
description:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a [gold]suspicious bag of riches[/gold] and a clearly [purple]cursed relic[/purple].

[jitter][blue]“This... or That?”[/blue][/jitter]
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

options.title: That
options.description: Add [red]Clumsy[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes: Choosing 'This' causes the player to grab the bag, triggering a frantic struggle before the arms and hole vanish. Choosing 'That' results in shackles materializing on the player's wrists, accompanied by ghostly laughter and a plume of fire, before the hole and arms disappear. The exact Gold amount (41-68) is determined randomly when the event spawns.
